crime.value: Kidnapping and imprisonment of multiple women
crime.quote: Did you get the other girls?' I ask the medics. In reply, one of them points at the girls who look much better than me.

victim.value: Evelyn and other women imprisoned by 'crazy she-devil'
victim.quote: You saved us, Eve.' Elle cries out. Behind her, two policemen are seen to drag the crazy she-devil out of the house.

closed_world.value: A house where the women were trapped
closed_world.quote: as they carry me out of the death trap

culprit_and_motive.value: Female perpetrator referred to as 'crazy she-devil', motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: two policemen are seen to drag the crazy she-devil out of the house. She keeps cursing me and the girls

resolution.value: Police rescue operation saves the imprisoned women
resolution.quote: two policemen are seen to drag the crazy she-devil out of the house

red_herring.value: Sarah's CEO-like appearance and successful corporate image creates false impression of her current status and relevance
red_herring.quote: She looked like a CEO or something; of course, she'd be one successful corporate lady

social_world.value: Corporate workplace hierarchy with promotion politics, managerial committee dynamics, and power struggles between employee and boss
social_world.quote: He gave you a promotion. A great one... when I am in the managerial committee right now

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical rescue and capture scene where the antagonist is dragged away by police while victims are saved
reveal_mechanic.quote: two policemen are seen to drag the crazy she-devil out of the house

investigator_wound.value: Evelyn's emotional trauma from past relationship with Richard and her pattern of self-sacrifice for others
investigator_wound.quote: Such a drama queen you are... I'm such a fricking unsettling human being

_meta.title: ebook radia al rashid frozen in time
